inputs.titre: Loi autorisant les femmes mariées à ouvrir un compte en banque sans l'autorisation de leur mari

reason: The image depicts a scene in a Parisian bank around 1907, showing a woman opening a bank account. The woman's clothing, including her hat and coat, aligns with the early 20th-century fashion. The bank interior, featuring large windows, wooden counters, and period-appropriate lighting fixtures, strengthens the historical context. The newsprint articles celebrating new laws visible outside the window further support the narrative. While the image is generally accurate, the style of the handbags and the style of the typeface on the posters are slightly modern and AI-generated, but could be overlooked. The image effectively captures the atmosphere of the early 1900s. There are no blatantly anachronistic elements like smartphones or modern cars.
